data.title: Xinjiang celebrates 70 years of progress and development. Unique region with diverse culture.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Beijing, a report released by China Daily highlighted the 70th anniversary of the establishment of the Xinjiang Uygur autonomous region. Over the past decades, Xinjiang has emerged as a region with distinctive geographical advantages and rich cultural heritage. As it commemorates this milestone, the region continues to showcase its potential and resilience, reflecting on its journey over the years.

data.title: Arecor partners with Sequel Med Tech for AT278, sells rights for AT220 and AT292 for up to $11m.
data.description: Arecor Therapeutics has revealed a new co-development agreement with Sequel Med Tech for their product AT278. Additionally, they have sold royalty and technology access fees which could amount to a total of $11 million.
Recent disclosure shows transactions by individuals responsible for management and closely associated, totaling $500,000.

data.title: Fitness company in Australia plunges 21% after investing $10M in Solana as part of crypto treasury plan.
data.description: Shares of Fitell, a company listed on the Nasdaq, experienced a significant drop on Wednesday following the purchase of $10 million worth of Solana. This investment is part of Fitell's recently revealed cryptocurrency treasury strategy.

data.title: Implantica launches RefluxStop® to fill treatment gap after competitor exit in Europe and the UK, targeting 1 billion acid reflux sufferers.
data.description: A Liechtenstein-based medtech company, Implantica AG (publ.), disclosed on Sept. 25, 2025, their pioneering work in incorporating advanced technology inside the body. One standout innovation is RefluxStop®, a distinctive device developed for addressing acid reflux. This solution is targeted towards a vast market, with approximately 1 billion individuals globally experiencing issues related to acid reflux.

data.title: Clean Food Group acquires one million litre fermentation facility, accelerating commercialization process. CFG targets $20 billion market.
data.description: In London, it has been announced that the commercialization process has been expedited, placing CFG in a distinctive position to target a market valued at US$20 billion.

data.title: LG Ad Solutions introduces Social Sync powered by Spaceback in UK, converting digital/social content into CTV ads. Global availability announced post US NewFronts, making CTV advertising accessible for brands.
data.description: In London, LG Ad Solutions unveiled Social Sync, powered by Spaceback, in the UK, a new creative solution for transforming digital and social content into high-impact Connected TV (CTV) ads. This collaboration, initially revealed at NewFronts in the US, is now accessible worldwide, marking a significant advancement for brands. Connected TV's increasing accessibility for advertisers is simplifying the ad creation process, offering a seamless transition for brands to engage with audiences on a broader scale.

data.title: Half of UK doctors believe age affects their ability to practise medicine, according to a Medscape survey.
data.description: A recent report by Medscape UK Doctors and Life After Medicine in London delves into the sentiments of doctors contemplating exiting the profession. The report sheds light on the emotions and experiences of healthcare professionals considering a career change.
